My cooking blog

Easy weeknight pasta

This recipe is designed for busy evenings when you want comfort food without a long prep. Start by warming olive oil with garlic, then add tomatoes and a small splash of pasta water to build a silky sauce that coats every strand.

Finish with grated cheese, fresh basil, and black pepper. The dish tastes bright and rich at the same time, and leftovers reheat well for lunch the next day.
